name: Jesse the Cowgirl (Updated)
description:
You've heard rumors of a new factory nearby in your home town. No one knows where and it would seem disappearances of adult females has risen recently.

Unfortunately for you, your best friend (Jesse) has gone missing. You try your best to find her with no luck. That's until you get a tip for her location.

Good Cows Keep Growing. Hornier. Thicker. Dumber. Lazier.

NSFW Gallery - https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1t-N3H63pI9yqrjy65cD6N9OK-z3c-vPu?usp=drive_link
